Name: Used Trekking Poles (HGE-TRK)
Description: Pre-owned trekking poles, cleaned and inspected — priced by condition

Name: Used Backpack >50L (HGE-PKK)
Description: Pre-owned backpacking packs 50L and above, inspected and cleaned

Name: Used 3-Season Tent (HGE-TNT)
Description: Pre-owned 3-season tent, seams checked, poles and stakes included

Name: Used Sleeping Bag <30°F (HGE-SBG)
Description: Pre-owned sleeping bag rated below 30°F, inspected and refreshed

Name: Used Climbing Hardware Lot (HGE-HWR)
Description: Pre-owned carabiners, slings, and misc hardware — inspected, no worn gates

Name: Used Ski Equipment (HGE-SKI)
Description: Pre-owned skis or ski boots, waxed and edge-checked

Name: Used Mountaineering Boots (HGE-BTS)
Description: Pre-owned double or single mountaineering boots, cleaned and inspected

Name: Used Headlamp & Electronics (HGE-ELC)
Description: Pre-owned headlamps, GPS units, and other outdoor electronics — tested

Name: Packing & Handling (HGE-PKG)
Description: Per-order packing and handling fee

Name: Used Daypack 20-35L (HGE-DPK)
Description: Pre-owned daypacks 20–35L, hydration-compatible, inspected and cleaned

Name: Used Hiking Boots (HGE-HBT)
Description: Pre-owned hiking boots, sole checked for delamination, cleaned

Name: Used Trekking Poles — Wholesale Lot (HGE-TRK-WS)
Description: Wholesale lot of 3+ trekking pole pairs — priced per lot, not per pair

Name: Used Water Filter (HGE-WTR)
Description: Pre-owned backcountry water filters — Sawyer, Katadyn, MSR — tested

Name: Used Hydration Pack (HGE-HYD)
Description: Pre-owned hydration packs with reservoir, bladder inspected for leaks

Name: Used Snowshoes (HGE-SNW)
Description: Pre-owned aluminum-frame snowshoes, binding checked, cleaned

Name: Used Camp Stove & Cookset (HGE-STW)
Description: Pre-owned backpacking stove and cookset — igniter tested, no cracks

Name: Used Softshell Jacket (HGE-JKT)
Description: Pre-owned softshell or hardshell jackets, DWR retreated if needed

Name: Used Sleeping Pad (HGE-PAD)
Description: Pre-owned foam or inflatable sleeping pads — inspected for leaks

Name: Expedited Shipping Upgrade (HGE-SHP-EXP)
Description: Upgrade to USPS Priority Express or FedEx 2-Day shipping

Name: Used Ice Axe (HGE-ICX)
Description: Pre-owned technical or general mountaineering ice axe — spike and pick inspected
